config.script:
"""
	Written By: Sagar Iparkar
	Written Date: 01/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Start/Complete orders from screen
	"""
	try:
		Project_VECV.PopUp.loader.openLoader(True)
		action = self.view.params.value
		rowData = self.view.params.rowData
		system.perspective.print("rowData"+str(rowData))
		areaId  = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
		lineId = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		workstationId = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		userId = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId

		shiftdetails = str(Project_VECV.WashingMachine.Shift.getShiftName(lineId))
		shiftdetails = shiftdetails.split('-')
		if len(shiftdetails) == 0:
			state = "success"
			message = 'Shift Not Configured'
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
		else:
			shiftId = shiftdetails[1]
			shiftCode = shiftdetails[0]
			bomId = rowData['m_BOM_id']
			M_BOMNumber = rowData['M_BOMNumber']
			orderNumber = rowData['order_number']
			serialNumber= rowData['serial_number']
			orderStatusId = 0
			#check for Classification Data
			classificationcount = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/getClassificationCount",{"BOM":bomId})
			if int(classificationcount) > 0:
				if int(action) == 1:
					eventId = 3
					message = 'Order Started'
					orderStatusId = 6
				else:
					eventId = 5
					message = 'Order Completed'
					
				params = {'Area_Id':areaId,'Line_Id':lineId,'WorkStation_Id':workstationId,'Event_Id':eventId,'BOM_Id':bomId,'Status_Id':orderStatusId,'OperatorID':userId,'CreatedBy':userId,'ShiftId':shiftId,'OrderNumber':orderNumber,'M_BOMNumber':M_BOMNumber,'serialNumber':serialNumber}	
				system.perspective.print("params washine machine" +str(params))
				result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/addUpdateWashingMachine",params)
				if str(result) == '1':
					result=str(result)
					system.perspective.print("message " +str(result)+'  '+str(message))
					state = "success"
					if eventId == 5:
						try:
							params = {'BomId':bomId}	
							result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/getClassficationData",params)
							GearRatio=result[0][0]
							
							params1 = {'shiftId':shiftId}
							result1 = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/getShiftDetails",params1)
	#						shiftCode=result1[0][0]
		#					shiftCode = str(Project_VECV.WashingMachine.Shift.getShiftName(lineId))
							Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,GearRatio,shiftCode)			
						except:
							screenName ='StartButton print '   
							filePath=str('Project_VECV/Templates/Order/WashingMachine')  
							errorFunction = str('Event:onAction  -> StartCompleteButton')  
							errorType=str('Application')  
							errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
							description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
							lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
							Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
					
				else:
					message = 'failed'
					system.perspective.print("message " +str(result)+'  '+str(message))
					state = "warning"
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
				system.perspective.sendMessage("WashineMachineTableRefresh", scope = "page")
				Project_VECV.PopUp.loader.openLoader(False)
				#End of try block	
			else:
				message = 'No Classification Data for This BOM'
				state = "warning"
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
				
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='StartButton'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Templates/Order/WashingMachine')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onAction  -> StartCompleteButton')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		Project_VECV.PopUp.loader.openLoader(False)
